brief: The US launched a third night of strikes on Iran and reinstated a blockade of the Hormuz strait, while ICE shootings in Maine and Texas fuel outrage. In research, new papers explore human control in AI coding assistants and wearable sensing, and the risks of AI in high-stakes crime linkage.
news_summary: Tensions escalate as the US strikes Iran for a third night and imposes tolls on Hormuz strait shipping; domestic controversy grows over ICE shootings of migrants and the sudden death of Senator Lindsey Graham.
papers_summary: Papers highlight the design of configurable AI coding assistants, behavioral adaptation in mandatory wearable sensing, and the use of AI in crime linkage analysis, underscoring the tension between automation and human oversight.

en.brief: The US launched a third night of strikes on Iran and reinstated a blockade of the Hormuz strait, while ICE shootings in Maine and Texas fuel outrage. In research, new papers explore human control in AI coding assistants and wearable sensing, and the risks of AI in high-stakes crime linkage.
en.news_summary: Tensions escalate as the US strikes Iran for a third night and imposes tolls on Hormuz strait shipping; domestic controversy grows over ICE shootings of migrants and the sudden death of Senator Lindsey Graham.
en.papers_summary: Papers highlight the design of configurable AI coding assistants, behavioral adaptation in mandatory wearable sensing, and the use of AI in crime linkage analysis, underscoring the tension between automation and human oversight.

zh.brief: 泰国曼谷酒吧大火导致至少27人死亡，美国参议员格雷厄姆去世，台风“巴威”袭击华东后北移。研究方面，AI编程助手和可穿戴传感系统的设计成为焦点。
zh.news_summary: 曼谷酒吧火灾致27死，目击者描述惨状；美国参议员格雷厄姆去世，其妹妹接任；台风“巴威”横扫华东后移至河北，引发洪水。
zh.papers_summary: arXiv发布了关于AI编程助手可配置设计、强制性可穿戴传感的行为探测等研究，关注人机交互中的控制与适应。

todays_image.caption: Like Lobophora algae drifting with the tide, the asylum bill is carried by shifting political currents of dissent and support.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
